steps.expected: Agent header shows monospace name, square indicator, key-value metadata with brutalist styling
steps.observed: Header displayed CEO name, square 6x6 indicator, and role/adapter/status key-value metadata

steps.expected: Name 11-12px weight 500 monospace, no radius, 1px divider borders
steps.observed: Name 12px/500 JetBrains Mono; borderBottom 1px solid; borderRadius 0px; metadata key/value 10px monospace

Run computed-style extraction on all role=tab elements
steps.expected: Monospace 11px tabs, no radius, active vs inactive treatment
steps.observed: All tabs are JetBrains Mono 11px with borderRadius 0px; active tab text is white and inactive tabs use muted white

assertions.title: Run transcript terminal style

steps.action: Open agent detail Runs tab and capture screenshot
steps.expected: Transcript with mixed reasoning/tool/error content is visible

steps.action: Audit runs tab for tool-call ($), error, and muted reasoning rows
steps.expected: Mixed transcript content with terminal-style color coding
steps.observed: No transcript rows found (toolLikeCount=0, errorLikeCount=0); only empty-state text present

assertions.issues: Blocked by fixture data: agent has no runs/transcript entries, so terminal-style mixed content cannot be validated.

assertions.title: Dashboard to Agent Detail preserves design system

steps.expected: Dashboard renders with rose palette and design-system styling
steps.observed: Dashboard loaded with rose background and brutalist UI

steps.action: Navigate from dashboard to agent detail (sidebar CEO link) and capture end screenshot
steps.expected: Agent detail keeps JetBrains Mono, zero radius, square indicator, rose palette
steps.observed: Agent detail retained rose palette; sampled fonts are JetBrains Mono; radius violations=0; square indicator 6x6 with 0px radius

assertions.title: Issues to Issue Detail preserves design system

steps.observed: Issues list page rendered with rose palette and monospace typography

steps.action: Open issue WEA-1 detail from Issues list and capture screenshot + style spot-check
steps.observed: Issue detail preserved JetBrains Mono (220/220 sampled), rose background, zero radius, no box shadow, and 1px border separators

steps.action: Capture screenshots for Dashboard, Agents, Issues, Agent Detail, and Issue Detail
steps.expected: All pages visually follow shared design system
steps.observed: All five page screenshots captured across the required route set

steps.expected: Each page has rose background, JetBrains Mono, zero radius, no shadow, and 1px borders
steps.observed: Per-page summary reports all checks passing on dashboard/agents/issues/agentDetail/issueDetail

frictions.description: agent-browser network capture returned no request entries during this session.
frictions.resolution: Used screenshots + computed-style audits as primary evidence and recorded network capture output file.

frictions.description: Clickable agent cards on list/dashboard were not deterministic for navigation in this dataset.
frictions.resolution: Used stable sidebar agent link (CEO) and issue row link (WEA-1) for read-only navigation.

blockers.description: No run transcript data exists for the validated agent (Runs tab shows "No runs yet.").

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed, 1 blocked (VAL-GUI-AGDET-003 blocked by missing run transcript data).
